post.summary: Create the first tenant on a fresh install. Only succeeds when zero tenants exist.

get.summary: Check whether a username is available for the owner account.

post.summary:
Generate passkey registration options for the first owner account.
Guard: exactly one tenant must exist with zero non-system members.

Complete passkey registration for the first owner account.
Verifies attestation, generates recovery codes, issues a full JWT session.

Initiate OIDC-based owner creation. Creates the subject and owner role,
then redirects to the OIDC provider to link an identity.

get.summary:
OIDC callback for setup owner creation. Called by the OIDC provider after authentication.
Links the identity, issues session cookies, and redirects to /setup.

post.summary: Creates a new record and returns it with a `Location` header pointing to the created resource.
post.description:
`Timestamp` must be set on the mapped model; requests that resolve to a default timestamp are rejected with `400 Bad Request`.
            
On success, responds with `201 Created` and a `Location` header containing the URL of the newly created record.

requestBody.description: The data used to create the record.

get.summary: Lists records with pagination, optional date range, device, and source filtering.
get.description:
The `sort` parameter accepts exactly two values:
- `timestamp_asc` — oldest records first
- `timestamp_desc` — newest records first (default)
            
Use `limit` and `offset` together for paginated access to large result sets.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the date range filter.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the date range filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. Defaults to `100`.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination. Defaults to `0`.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order for results by timestamp. Defaults to `timestamp_desc`.

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Optional filter to restrict results to a specific device.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Optional filter to restrict results to a specific data source.

put.summary: Updates an existing record by ID and returns the updated record.
put.description:
Returns `404 Not Found` if no record with the given id exists.
            
`Timestamp` must be set on the mapped model; requests that resolve to a default timestamp are rejected with `400 Bad Request`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record to update.

requestBody.description: The data to apply to the existing record.

delete.description: Returns `204 No Content` on success, or `404 Not Found` if no record with the given id exists.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record to delete.

get.summary: Retrieves a single record by its unique identifier.
get.description: Returns `404 Not Found` if no record with the given id exists.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record.

get.description: Response is cached for 90 seconds, varying by all query parameters.

post.summary:
Atomically create a correlated Bolus + CarbIntake for a meal event.
Both records share a single CorrelationId and are persisted within a
single transaction. When an existing row matches on
(DataSource, SyncIdentifier), the idempotent upsert applies and the
response returns 200 instead of 201.

get.summary:
Get meal events grouped by CorrelationId. Each event carries its
own carb intakes, correlated boluses, food attribution rows, and
aggregated totals. Carb intakes with a null CorrelationId become
single-member events on their own (they are NOT collapsed together).
Get compression low suggestions with optional filtering
Get a single suggestion with glucose entries for charting

delete.summary: Delete a suggestion and its associated state span

post.summary: Accept a suggestion with adjusted bounds
Dismiss a suggestion
Manually trigger detection for a date range (for testing)
post.description:
Provide either a single `nightOf` date or a range with `startDate` and `endDate`.
When using a range, detection runs for each night in the range (inclusive).

post.summary: Create multiple sensor glucose readings in bulk (max 1000).

get.summary:
Export a full snapshot of all tenants and their identity/config data.
Secrets are decrypted to plaintext for portability.

post.summary:
Import a snapshot, replacing all identity/config data.
Wraps the entire operation in a transaction.
Trigger a sync for every configured connector across all tenants.

get.summary:
List all tenants with record counts and connector health (dev-only).
Used by the Aspire dashboard "List Tenants" command.

post.summary:
Create a new tenant without authentication (dev-only).
Used by the Aspire dashboard "Create Tenant" command.

delete.summary: Delete a tenant and all associated data without authentication (dev-only).

post.summary:
Import snapshot data for a single tenant, matched by slug in the
provided snapshot. Upserts referenced subjects and passkeys without
affecting other tenants.

get.summary: Lists records with pagination, optional date range, device, and source filtering.
get.description:
The `sort` parameter accepts exactly two values:
- `timestamp_asc` — oldest records first
- `timestamp_desc` — newest records first (default)
            
Use `limit` and `offset` together for paginated access to large result sets.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the date range filter.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the date range filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. Defaults to `100`.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination. Defaults to `0`.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order for results by timestamp. Defaults to `timestamp_desc`.

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Optional filter to restrict results to a specific device.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Optional filter to restrict results to a specific data source.

get.summary: Retrieves a single record by its unique identifier.
get.description: Returns `404 Not Found` if no record with the given id exists.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record.

get.summary: Get the current battery status for all tracked devices

parameters.name: recentMinutes
parameters.description: How many minutes back to consider for "recent" readings (default: 30)

200.description: Current battery status for all devices

get.summary: Get battery readings for a device over a time period

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Device identifier (optional, returns all devices if not specified)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start time in milliseconds since Unix epoch

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End time in milliseconds since Unix epoch

200.description: Battery readings for the specified period

get.summary: Get battery statistics for a device or all devices

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Device identifier (optional, returns all devices if not specified)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start time in milliseconds since Unix epoch (default: 7 days ago)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End time in milliseconds since Unix epoch (default: now)

200.description: Battery statistics for the specified period

get.summary: Get charge cycle history for a device

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Device identifier (optional, returns all devices if not specified)

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start time in milliseconds since Unix epoch

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End time in milliseconds since Unix epoch

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of cycles to return (default: 100)

200.description: Charge cycles for the specified period

Get cannula/site age (CAGE)

Get sensor age (SAGE)
Returns both Sensor Start and Sensor Change events
Get insulin reservoir age (IAGE)
Get pump battery age (BAGE)
Get all device ages in a single call

delete.summary: Delete a device event by its external sync identifier (dataSource + syncIdentifier pair).

post.summary: Creates a new record and returns it with a `Location` header pointing to the created resource.
post.description:
`Timestamp` must be set on the mapped model; requests that resolve to a default timestamp are rejected with `400 Bad Request`.
            
On success, responds with `201 Created` and a `Location` header containing the URL of the newly created record.

requestBody.description: The data used to create the record.

get.summary: Lists records with pagination, optional date range, device, and source filtering.
get.description:
The `sort` parameter accepts exactly two values:
- `timestamp_asc` — oldest records first
- `timestamp_desc` — newest records first (default)
            
Use `limit` and `offset` together for paginated access to large result sets.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the date range filter.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the date range filter.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return. Defaults to `100`.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of records to skip for pagination. Defaults to `0`.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order for results by timestamp. Defaults to `timestamp_desc`.

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: Optional filter to restrict results to a specific device.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Optional filter to restrict results to a specific data source.

put.summary: Updates an existing record by ID and returns the updated record.
put.description:
Returns `404 Not Found` if no record with the given id exists.
            
`Timestamp` must be set on the mapped model; requests that resolve to a default timestamp are rejected with `400 Bad Request`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record to update.

requestBody.description: The data to apply to the existing record.

delete.description: Returns `204 No Content` on success, or `404 Not Found` if no record with the given id exists.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record to delete.

get.summary:
Gets the configuration for a specific connector.
Returns runtime configuration only (secrets are not included).

parameters.name: connectorName
parameters.description: The connector name (e.g., "Dexcom", "Glooko")

200.description: Configuration response or 404 if not found

put.summary:
Saves or updates runtime configuration for a connector.
Only properties marked with [RuntimeConfigurable] are accepted.
Validates the configuration against the connector's schema before saving.

parameters.name: connectorName
parameters.description: The connector name

requestBody.description: Configuration values as JSON

delete.summary: Deletes all configuration and secrets for a connector.

parameters.name: connectorName
parameters.description: The connector name

get.summary:
Gets the JSON Schema for a connector's configuration.
Schema is generated from the connector's configuration class attributes.
This endpoint is public since schema is just metadata, not sensitive data.

parameters.name: connectorName
parameters.description: The connector name

get.summary:
Gets the effective configuration from a running connector.
This returns the actual runtime values including those resolved from environment variables.
This endpoint is public since it only exposes non-secret configuration values.

parameters.name: connectorName
parameters.description: The connector name

200.description: Dictionary of property names to effective values

put.summary:
Saves encrypted secrets for a connector.
Secrets are encrypted using AES-256-GCM before storage.

parameters.name: connectorName
parameters.description: The connector name

requestBody.description: Dictionary of secret property names to plaintext values

get.summary: Gets status information for all registered connectors.

parameters.name: connectorName
parameters.description: The connector name

requestBody.description: Request containing the active state

get.summary: Gets the webhook notification settings for the current tenant.

put.summary: Saves webhook notification settings.

post.summary: Tests webhook settings by sending test payloads to configured URLs.

get.summary: Query mutation audit log entries for the current tenant.
Query read access audit log entries for the current tenant.
Get the audit configuration for the current tenant.

put.summary: Create or update the audit configuration for the current tenant.

get.summary: Get actogram report data for a time window.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start of the window as Unix milliseconds (inclusive).

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description:
End of the window as Unix milliseconds (exclusive).
            Must be greater than startTime.

get.summary: Gets the current analytics configuration and collection status.

200.description:
An object containing whether collection is enabled, the current AnalyticsCollectionConfig,
            system info, and a human-readable privacy note.

get.summary: Gets current system performance metrics such as request latencies and memory usage.
Gets current usage statistics such as endpoint hit counts and feature usage.

Gets any pending analytics data queued for collection, returned for transparency.
Since data is stored locally only, this is informational.

200.description: An AnalyticsBatch if there is pending data, or a no-data message if none.

put.summary: Updates analytics collection configuration.

requestBody.description: The new AnalyticsCollectionConfig to persist.

200.description: The updated configuration and a confirmation message.

delete.summary: Clears all locally stored analytics data. This action cannot be undone.

get.summary: Get information about what data is collected and privacy policy

post.summary:
Tracks a custom AnalyticsEvent. Useful for integration testing or manually
recording discrete events. Returns 400 Bad Request if analytics collection is disabled.

requestBody.description: The custom AnalyticsEvent to record.

get.summary:
Gets complete dashboard chart data in a single call.
Returns pre-calculated IOB, COB, basal series, categorized treatment markers,
state spans, system events, tracker markers, and glucose readings.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start of the requested window as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description:
End of the requested window as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
            Must be greater than startTime.

parameters.name: intervalMinutes
parameters.description: Granularity of the returned series in minutes (1–60, default 5).

get.summary: Retrieves all records that share the given correlation ID across every V4 data type.

parameters.name: correlationId
parameters.description: The shared correlation ID to look up.

200.description:
An anonymous object with typed arrays for each data category
(SensorGlucose, MeterGlucose, Calibrations, Boluses,
CarbIntakes, BGChecks, Notes, BolusCalculations).
Arrays are empty when no matching records exist in that category.

get.summary: Gets the list of calendar years that contain glucose data and the available data sources.

parameters.description: The year to compute GRI timeline for

parameters.description: Optional data source filters (multiple allowed)

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Optional profile ID to use for predictions

200.description: Glucose predictions including IOB, UAM, COB, and zero-temp curves

get.summary: Check the status of the prediction service.

200.description: Status of the prediction service including configured source

get.summary:
Get retrospective data at a specific point in time
Returns IOB, COB, glucose, basal rate, and recent treatments

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for the retrospective point

400.description: If the time parameter is invalid

500.description: If there was an internal server error

get.summary:
Get retrospective data for an entire day at specified interval
Returns IOB, COB, glucose, and basal data for every interval throughout the day

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format

parameters.name: intervalMinutes
parameters.description: Interval in minutes between data points (default: 5)

500.description: If there was an internal server error

get.summary:
Get basal rate timeline for a day
Returns basal rate data points showing scheduled and temp basal changes

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format

parameters.name: intervalMinutes
parameters.description: Interval in minutes between data points (default: 5)

200.description: Basal rate timeline for the day

get.summary:
Gets comprehensive statistics for multiple time periods (1, 3, 7, 30, and 90 days).
Fetches sensor glucose, bolus, carb, and temp-basal data from the database for each period,
computes GlucoseAnalytics, TreatmentSummary, and
InsulinDeliveryStatistics, and caches the result for 5 minutes.
get.description:
When no TempBasal or algorithm bolus records are found but a profile is loaded, the method
falls back to computing scheduled basal from the active profile schedule via IBasalRateResolver.
GMI reliability is assessed per-period using context-appropriate recommended-day minimums
(e.g., 1-day periods cannot require 14 days of data).

200.description:
A MultiPeriodStatistics containing a PeriodStatistics
            entry for each of the five standard periods.

post.summary: Analyze glucose patterns around site changes to identify impact of site age on control

requestBody.description: Request containing sensor glucose readings, device events, and analysis parameters

200.description: Site change impact analysis with averaged glucose patterns

get.summary: Calculate daily basal/bolus ratio statistics for a date range

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date of the analysis period

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date of the analysis period

200.description: Daily basal/bolus ratio breakdown with averages

get.summary: Calculate comprehensive insulin delivery statistics for a date range

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date of the analysis period

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date of the analysis period

get.summary: Calculate comprehensive basal analysis statistics for a date range

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date of the analysis period

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date of the analysis period

200.description: Comprehensive basal analysis with stats, temp basal info, and hourly percentiles

get.summary:
Calculates AID (Automated Insulin Delivery) system metrics for a date range.
Uses patient device records to segment the period by algorithm and compute time-weighted metrics
via IAidMetricsService.
get.description:
Fetches APS snapshots, temp basals, device events, glucose readings, and target-range schedules
from their respective repositories. CGM metrics are derived from AnalyzeGlucoseData.
Target range is optional; the method continues without it if the repository throws.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the analysis period (UTC).

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Inclusive end of the analysis period (UTC).

200.description:
An AidSystemMetrics object containing loop-on time, site-change counts,
            CGM active percent, and per-algorithm segment breakdowns.

get.summary: Get widget-friendly summary data including current glucose, IOB, COB, trackers, and alarm state.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Number of hours of glucose history to include (default 0 for current reading only)

parameters.name: includePredictions
parameters.description: Whether to include predicted glucose values (default false)

200.description: Widget summary response with aggregated diabetes management data

post.summary: Upload or replace the current subject's avatar. Image is resized to 256x256 WebP.

get.summary: Serve the current subject's avatar image.

UpdateCoachMarkRequest.description: Request body for updating a coach mark's status.

ConnectorStatusDto.description:
DTO representing the current operational status of a data source connector
(e.g. Dexcom, Glooko, Libre). Returned by the admin connector status endpoints.

id.description: Unique identifier of the connector configuration.

totalEntries.description: Total number of entries imported by this connector over its lifetime.

lastEntryTime.description: Timestamp of the most recent entry imported by this connector.

entriesLast24Hours.description: Number of entries imported in the last 24 hours.

state.description: Current operational state of the connector.

stateMessage.description: Optional message providing detail about the current state (e.g. error description).

isHealthy.description: Whether the connector is considered healthy based on recent sync activity.

lastSyncAttempt.description: When the connector last attempted to sync

lastSuccessfulSync.description: When the connector last successfully completed a sync

totalItemsBreakdown.description:
Breakdown of total items processed by data type
Keys are data type names (e.g., "Glucose", "Treatments", "Food")

itemsLast24HoursBreakdown.description:
Breakdown of items processed in the last 24 hours by data type
Keys are data type names (e.g., "Glucose", "Treatments", "Food")

UpsertBolusCalculationRequest.description:
Request body for upserting a bolus calculator wizard record via the V4 API.
Captures the inputs and recommendation from a bolus calculation event.

timestamp.description: When the bolus calculation was performed.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device that ran the calculation.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

bloodGlucoseInput.description: Blood glucose value used as input to the calculator.

carbInput.description: Carbohydrate amount (grams) used as input to the calculator.

insulinOnBoard.description: Insulin on board at the time of calculation, in units.

insulinRecommendation.description: Total insulin dose recommended by the calculator, in units.

carbRatio.description: Insulin-to-carb ratio used in the calculation (grams per unit). Must be strictly positive.

calculationType.description: Type of calculation performed (e.g. correction only, meal only, combined).

insulinRecommendationForCarbs.description: Portion of the recommendation attributable to carb coverage.

insulinProgrammed.description: Insulin amount actually programmed into the pump.

enteredInsulin.description: Insulin amount manually entered by the user.

splitNow.description: Percentage of a dual-wave bolus delivered immediately.

splitExt.description: Percentage of a dual-wave bolus delivered as extended.

preBolus.description: Pre-bolus time in minutes (insulin given before eating).

CreateBolusRequest.description: Request body for creating a new insulin bolus record via the V4 API.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device that delivered the bolus (e.g. pump serial number).

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

dataSource.description: Upstream data source identifier; required when SyncIdentifier is supplied.

programmed.description: Programmed insulin amount in units (may differ from delivered for interrupted boluses).

delivered.description: Actually delivered insulin amount in units.

bolusType.description: Bolus delivery pattern (normal, square wave, dual wave, etc.).

kind.description: Whether this bolus was manually entered or originated from a pump/loop system.

automatic.description: Whether this bolus was delivered automatically by an APS/loop system.

syncIdentifier.description: Upstream sync identifier for deduplication, paired with DataSource.

insulinType.description: Type or brand of insulin used (e.g. "Humalog", "NovoRapid").

patientInsulinId.description:
Optional reference to a PatientInsulin. When provided, the server
resolves it to a TreatmentInsulinContext snapshot and overwrites
InsulinType with the insulin's name.

unabsorbed.description: Insulin on board (unabsorbed) at the time of the bolus, in units.

bolusCalculationId.description: Links this bolus to the bolus calculation that recommended it.

apsSnapshotId.description: Links this bolus to the APS decision snapshot that triggered it.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier for grouping related events (e.g. a meal bolus and carb intake).

UpdateBolusRequest.description:
Request body for updating an existing insulin bolus record via the V4 API.
The bolus is identified by the route-level ID parameter.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device that delivered the bolus.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

dataSource.description: Upstream data source identifier; required when SyncIdentifier is supplied.

delivered.description: Actually delivered insulin amount in units.

automatic.description: Whether this bolus was delivered automatically by an APS/loop system.

syncIdentifier.description: Upstream sync identifier for deduplication, paired with DataSource.

insulinType.description: Type or brand of insulin used (e.g. "Humalog", "NovoRapid").

patientInsulinId.description:
Optional reference to a PatientInsulin. When provided, the server
resolves it to a TreatmentInsulinContext snapshot and overwrites
InsulinType with the insulin's name.

unabsorbed.description: Insulin on board (unabsorbed) at the time of the bolus, in units.

bolusCalculationId.description: Links this bolus to the bolus calculation that recommended it.

apsSnapshotId.description: Links this bolus to the APS decision snapshot that triggered it.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier for grouping related events.

SuggestedMealMatch.description: A suggested meal match between a food entry and treatment

AcceptMatchRequest.description: Request to accept a meal match

DismissMatchRequest.description: Request to dismiss a meal match

UpsertNoteRequest.description: Request body for upserting a user note or announcement via the V4 API.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device that created the note.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

eventType.description: Nightscout-compatible event type string (capped at 200 characters).

isAnnouncement.description: When true, the note is displayed as a prominent announcement.

CreateCarbIntakeRequest.description: Request body for creating a new carbohydrate intake record via the V4 API.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device that recorded the intake.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

dataSource.description: Upstream data source identifier; required when SyncIdentifier is supplied.

carbs.description: Amount of carbohydrates consumed in grams.

syncIdentifier.description: Upstream sync identifier for deduplication, paired with DataSource.

carbTime.description: Minutes from bolus time to expected carb absorption start (pre-bolus offset).

absorptionTime.description: Expected carb absorption duration in minutes.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier for grouping related events (e.g. a meal bolus and carb intake).

UpdateCarbIntakeRequest.description:
Request body for updating an existing carbohydrate intake record via the V4 API.
The record is identified by the route-level ID parameter.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device that recorded the intake.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

dataSource.description: Upstream data source identifier; required when SyncIdentifier is supplied.

carbs.description: Amount of carbohydrates consumed in grams.

syncIdentifier.description: Upstream sync identifier for deduplication, paired with DataSource.

carbTime.description: Minutes from bolus time to expected carb absorption start (pre-bolus offset).

absorptionTime.description: Expected carb absorption duration in minutes.

correlationId.description: Correlation identifier for grouping related events.

CarbIntakeFoodRequest.description: Request body for adding/updating a food entry on a carb intake record.

CreateMealRequest.description:
Request body for creating a correlated meal event (a single bolus + single carb
intake sharing a CorrelationId, created atomically).

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

insulin.description: Total insulin amount in units for the meal bolus.

carbs.description: Amount of carbohydrates consumed in grams.

bolusType.description: Bolus delivery pattern (normal, square wave, dual wave, etc.).

absorptionTime.description: Expected carb absorption duration in minutes.

carbTime.description: Minutes from bolus time to expected carb absorption start (pre-bolus offset).

insulinType.description: Type or brand of insulin used (e.g. "Humalog", "NovoRapid").

device.description: Identifier of the device that delivered the bolus.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

dataSource.description: Upstream data source identifier; required when SyncIdentifier is supplied.

syncIdentifier.description: Upstream sync identifier for deduplication, paired with DataSource.

bolusCalculationId.description: Links this meal to the bolus calculation that recommended the insulin dose.

correlationId.description: Caller-supplied correlation identifier; if omitted, the server generates one.

CreateMealResponse.description:
Response for POST /api/v4/nutrition/meals. Carries the shared
correlation id along with both halves of the persisted meal event.

DeduplicationJobResponse.description: Response for starting a deduplication job.

jobId.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier assigned to the started job.

message.description: Gets or sets a human-readable status message.

statusUrl.description: Gets or sets the relative URL to poll for job status.

CancelJobResponse.description: Response for cancelling a deduplication job.

jobId.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the cancelled job.

cancelled.description: Gets or sets whether the cancellation was accepted.

message.description: Gets or sets a human-readable message describing the outcome.

LinkedRecordsResponse.description: Response containing linked records for a canonical deduplication group.

canonicalId.description: Gets or sets the canonical record identifier shared by all linked records.

recordType.description: Gets or sets the record type of the canonical group.

linkedRecords.description: Gets or sets the full list of records linked to the canonical group.

TestMigrationConnectionRequest.description: Request to test a Nightscout connection

TestMigrationConnectionResult.description: Result of testing a migration connection

StartMigrationRequest.description: Parameters for starting a new data migration from Nightscout or MongoDB.

collections.description: Collections to migrate. Empty means all.

MigrationJobStatus.description:
Real-time progress snapshot for a running MigrationJobInfo.
EstimatedTimeRemaining is null until enough records have
been processed to project a completion time.

PendingMigrationConfig.description:
Auto-start migration configuration discovered from environment variables
(MIGRATION_MODE, MIGRATION_NS_URL, MIGRATION_NS_API_SECRET, etc.).
Credentials are never returned verbatim; only their presence is indicated via
HasApiSecret and HasMongoConnectionString.

hasPendingConfig.description: Whether there is a pending migration configuration in env vars

mode.description: Migration mode from MIGRATION_MODE env var

nightscoutUrl.description: Nightscout URL from MIGRATION_NS_URL env var

hasApiSecret.description: Whether MIGRATION_NS_API_SECRET is set (never returns the actual secret)

hasMongoConnectionString.description: Whether MIGRATION_MONGO_CONNECTION_STRING is set (never returns the actual string)

mongoDatabaseName.description: MongoDB database name from MIGRATION_MONGO_DATABASE_NAME env var

MigrationSourceDto.description: Migration source DTO for API responses

lastMigrationAt.description: When the last successful migration completed

lastMigratedDataTimestamp.description: Newest data timestamp migrated (for "since last" default)

createdAt.description: When this source was first added

ManualTestRequest.description: Request for manual API comparison test

nightscoutUrl.description: Base URL of the Nightscout server to compare against

apiSecret.description: API secret (SHA1 hash or plain text)

method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.) - defaults to GET

requestBody.description: Optional request body for POST/PUT requests

ManualTestResult.description: Result of manual API comparison test

queryPath.description: The API path that was tested

nightscoutResponseTimeMs.description: Response time from Nightscout in milliseconds

nocturneResponseTimeMs.description: Response time from Nocturne in milliseconds

nightscoutError.description: Error message if Nightscout request failed

nocturneError.description: Error message if Nocturne request failed

UploaderSetupResponse.description: Response model for uploader setup instructions

baseUrl.description: Base URL for this Nocturne instance

connectUrl.description:
Deep-link URL for apps that support OAuth device authorization via QR code
(e.g. xdrip://connect/nocturne?url=https://your-instance.com).
When present, the frontend shows a QR code and inline device-code input.

ConnectorSyncStatus.description: Response model for connector sync status

dataSource.description: The data source name used in the database (e.g., "dexcom-connector")

latestEntryTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the latest entry, or null if no entries exist

oldestEntryTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the oldest entry, or null if no entries exist

latestTreatmentTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the latest treatment, or null if no treatments exist

oldestTreatmentTimestamp.description: The timestamp of the oldest treatment, or null if no treatments exist

hasEntries.description: Whether any entries exist for this connector

hasTreatments.description: Whether any treatments exist for this connector

state.description: Current connector state (Idle, Syncing, BackingOff, Error)

stateMessage.description: Optional message describing the current state

CreateSystemEventRequest.description: Request body for creating a new SystemEvent record.

eventType.description: Gets or sets the event type (alarm, warning, or info).

category.description: Gets or sets the event category.

code.description: Gets or sets an optional short code identifying the event.

description.description: Gets or sets a human-readable description of the event.

mills.description: Gets or sets the Unix millisecond timestamp of the event.

source.description: Gets or sets the data source identifier (defaults to "manual" when absent).

metadata.description: Gets or sets arbitrary metadata associated with the event.

originalId.description: Gets or sets the original MongoDB ObjectId, preserved for migration compatibility.

TrackerAlertDto.description: DTO for tracker alerts returned to the frontend

dashboardVisibility.description: Dashboard visibility: Off, Always, Info, Warn, Hazard, Urgent

visibility.description: Visibility level for this tracker (Public, Private, RoleRestricted)

startEventType.description: Event type to create when tracker is started (for Nightscout compatibility)

completionEventType.description: Event type to create when tracker is completed (for Nightscout compatibility)

dashboardVisibility.description: Dashboard visibility: Off, Always, Info, Warn, Hazard, Urgent

visibility.description: Visibility level for this tracker (Public, Private, RoleRestricted)

startEventType.description: Event type to create when tracker is started (for Nightscout compatibility)

completionEventType.description: Event type to create when tracker is completed (for Nightscout compatibility)

mode.description: Tracker mode: Duration (time-based) or Event (scheduled datetime)

dashboardVisibility.description: Dashboard visibility: Off, Always, Info, Warn, Hazard, Urgent

visibility.description: Visibility level for this tracker (Public, Private, RoleRestricted)

startEventType.description: Event type to create when tracker is started (for Nightscout compatibility)

completionEventType.description: Event type to create when tracker is completed (for Nightscout compatibility)

mode.description: Tracker mode: Duration (time-based) or Event (scheduled datetime)

startedAt.description: Optional custom start time for backdating. Defaults to now if not provided.

scheduledAt.description: For Event mode: the scheduled datetime of the event

completedAt.description: Optional custom completion time for backdating. Defaults to now if not provided.

ConnectedAppDto.description: Connected app DTO returned by GET /api/v4/account/connected-apps.

CreateGuestLinkRequest.description: Request body for creating a guest link.

ActivateGuestLinkRequest.description: Request body for activating a guest link.

UpsertActivityRequest.description: Request body for upserting an activity record via the V4 API.

mills.description: When the activity occurred, as a Unix millisecond timestamp.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

duration.description: Duration of the activity in minutes.

enteredBy.description: Name of the application or person that submitted this record.

name.description: Name or title of the activity.

UpsertHeartRateRequest.description: Request body for upserting a heart rate measurement via the V4 API.

timestamp.description: When the heart rate measurement was taken.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

bpm.description: Heart rate in beats per minute.

device.description: Identifier of the wearable or sensor device.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

UpsertStepCountRequest.description: Request body for upserting a step count measurement via the V4 API.

timestamp.description: When the step count was recorded.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

metric.description: Step count metric value for the measurement period.

source.description: Source identifier for the step data (device-specific).

device.description: Identifier of the wearable or sensor device.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

UpsertBGCheckRequest.description: Request body for upserting a blood glucose (BG) check record via the V4 API.

timestamp.description: When the BG check was performed.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device that performed the check.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

units.description: Unit of the glucose reading (mg/dL or mmol/L).

glucoseType.description: Origin of the glucose value (finger stick, sensor, manual, etc.).

UpsertCalibrationRequest.description: Request body for upserting a CGM sensor calibration record via the V4 API.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the CGM device being calibrated.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

UpsertMeterGlucoseRequest.description: Request body for upserting a meter glucose reading via the V4 API.

timestamp.description: When the meter reading was taken.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the glucose meter device.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

UpsertSensorGlucoseRequest.description: Request body for upserting a CGM sensor glucose reading via the V4 API.

timestamp.description: When the sensor reading was taken.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the CGM transmitter or receiver.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

direction.description: Glucose trend direction (rising, falling, stable, etc.).

trendRate.description: Rate of glucose change in mg/dL per minute.

delta.description: Glucose delta in mg/dL over the last 5 minutes

glucoseProcessing.description:
Whether this glucose value is smoothed or unsmoothed.
Accepted values: "Smoothed", "Unsmoothed". Case-insensitive. Null for unknown.

smoothedMgdl.description: Smoothed glucose value in mg/dL, when known.

unsmoothedMgdl.description: Unsmoothed (raw) glucose value in mg/dL, when known.

DevSnapshotDto.description:
Top-level snapshot of all tenants and their associated identity/config data.
Used for dev-only export/import of non-clinical setup state.

exportedAt.description: Timestamp when the snapshot was exported.

tenants.description: All tenants and their associated identity/config data.

TenantSnapshotDto.description: Snapshot of a single tenant's identity and configuration data for dev-only export/import.

subjects.description: All subjects (users/service accounts) belonging to this tenant.

passkeyCredentials.description: All passkey credentials registered for this tenant's subjects.

members.description: All tenant membership records linking subjects to the tenant.

memberRoles.description: All role assignments for tenant members.

oAuthClients.description: All OAuth client registrations for this tenant.

connectorConfigurations.description: All connector configurations (with secrets decrypted) for this tenant.

UpsertDeviceEventRequest.description: Request body for upserting a device event record (site changes, sensor starts, etc.) via the V4 API.

utcOffset.description: UTC offset in minutes at the time of the event, for local-time display.

device.description: Identifier of the device involved in the event.

app.description: Name of the application that submitted this record.

eventType.description: The type of device event (e.g. site change, sensor start, pump resume).

notes.description: Free-text notes associated with the event (capped at 10,000 characters).

delta.description: Rate of glucose change (mg/dL per 5 min)

eventualBg.description: Eventual blood glucose if trend continues (mg/dL)

available.description: Whether a prediction service is available

RetrospectiveDataResponse.description: Response for single point retrospective data

GlycemicVariabilityRequest.description: Request model for glycemic variability calculation

values.description: Collection of glucose values in mg/dL

entries.description: Collection of sensor glucose readings with timestamps

TimeInRangeRequest.description: Request model for time in range calculation

GlucoseDistributionRequest.description: Request model for glucose distribution calculation

TreatmentSummaryRequest.description: Request model for treatment summary calculation

GlucoseAnalyticsRequest.description: Request model for comprehensive glucose analytics

ExtendedGlucoseAnalyticsRequest.description: Request model for extended glucose analytics with GMI, GRI, and clinical assessment

population.description: Diabetes population type for clinical target assessment
Diabetes population type for clinical target assessment

DataSufficiencyRequest.description: Request model for data sufficiency assessment

expectedReadingsPerDay.description: Expected readings per day based on sensor type (default: 288 for 5-minute intervals)

SiteChangeImpactRequest.description: Request model for site change impact analysis

deviceEvents.description: Collection of device events (must include site changes)

hoursBeforeChange.description: Hours before site change to analyze (default: 12)

hoursAfterChange.description: Hours after site change to analyze (default: 24)

bucketSizeMinutes.description: Time bucket size for averaging in minutes (default: 30)

MigrationMode.description: Enumerates the modes for data migration

MigrationJobState.description:
Lifecycle state of a MigrationJobInfo.
Transitions are: Pending → Validating → Running → Completed|Failed, or any state → Cancelled.

ChannelStatusEntry.description: Represents the derived availability status of a single alert delivery channel.

TenantEntityDto.description: Serialized representation of a tenant entity for snapshot export/import.

SubjectEntityDto.description: Serialized representation of a subject (user or service account) for snapshot export/import.

PasskeyCredentialEntityDto.description:
Serialized representation of a WebAuthn passkey credential. Binary fields (CredentialId, PublicKey)
are base64-encoded strings for JSON portability.

TenantRoleEntityDto.description: Serialized representation of a tenant-scoped authorization role for snapshot export/import.

TenantMemberEntityDto.description: Serialized representation of a tenant membership (subject-to-tenant link) for snapshot export/import.

TenantMemberRoleEntityDto.description: Serialized representation of a role assignment for a tenant member.

OAuthClientEntityDto.description: Serialized representation of an OAuth client registration for snapshot export/import.

ConnectorConfigSnapshotDto.description: Serialized representation of a connector configuration with decrypted secrets for snapshot export/import.

default.description: Main prediction curve (mg/dL values at 5-min intervals)

zeroTemp.description: Zero-temp prediction (what happens if basal stops)

GlucoseData.description: Glucose data at a specific point in time

IobData.description: IOB data at a specific point in time

CobData.description: COB data at a specific point in time

BasalData.description: Basal rate data at a specific point in time
